creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 180874
v1 patch

# QA

- portlint  OK
- poudriere OK 11.0R amd64

See https://github.com/zerotier/ZeroTierOne/pull/457 for upstreamed compiler change, by using clang we avoid a 500Mib runtime dependency on all of gcc.

# maintainer change

last 2 PRs both timed out, and I've contacted maintainer privately & had no
response. Given there has been nothing since January 2016 from them, I added
port ownership change to this PR.

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=213179
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=215031

1.2.0 represents a major change, full details at https://www.zerotier.com/blog/?p=1032
